div1.entryFree:
Shrine, 1) altar, or rather the place where the image of a saint is deposited: at Saint Alban's s. H6B II, 1, 63. H6B II, 1, 63 H6B II, 1, 63
2) the image of a saint: offer pure incense to so pure a s. (i. e. Lucrece) Lucr. 194. from the four corners of the earth they come, to kiss this s., this mortal-breathing saint, Merch. II, 7, 40. if I profane with my unworthiest hand this holy s. Rom. I, 5, 96. laming the s. of Venus or straight-pight Minerva, Cymb. V, 5, 164.
